arts.ttl: Tottenham landed £23m Brazilian and former Real Madrid defender in January transfers
arts.sum: Defoe's contribution was significant, scoring 143 goals in 363 appearances for Spurs, helping the club avoid relegation and secure a spot in the Champions League. A key player in that same League Cup-winning team, Jonathan Woodgate, joined Tottenham in January 2008.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane and Mathys Tel agree on one thing as Tottenham transfer decision imminent
arts.sum: Tel, who arrived in Germany one year before Kane, was still only 17 at the time of his transfer. In Tel's first year at Bayern he started just one league game, for example.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Tottenham Carabao Cup semi-final set to be shown for free
arts.sum: Speaking to reporters ahead of the Spurs clash, Slot said: "No, I don't think I have to prepare them differently than in any other game. Liverpool or Tottenham Hotspur will face Newcastle United in the Carabao Cup final.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. Tottenham: Ange Postecoglou confirms Micky van de Ven injury blow ahead of EFL Cup semi-final
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur boss Ange Postecoglou provides an update on Micky van de Ven's availability ahead of Thursday's EFL Cup semi-final second leg against Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Postecoglou's big Mathys Tel statement - 'I didn't sign him for just six months'
arts.sum: German media reported that Tel had an option to veto any option if he wanted, but in the latest episode of the Gold & Guest Talk Tottenham podcast on Wednesday morning, football.london reported that the north London club were certain that the youngster would become a Spurs player if they took up the option at the end of the season and he had already agreed to a long-term deal. Spurs made a transfer deadline day swoop for the 19-year-old attacker, with a long conversation with Postecoglou proving key in getting the deal over the line after the Frenchman asked for more time the previous week to think about the move.

arts.ttl: Analysis: Versatile Tel can breathe new life into Spurs' attack
arts.sum: Overall, just 16 of his 83 competitive appearances for the German club have come in the starting line-up and he’s played just over half of his minutes in a Bayern shirt, 51.8 per cent, as a substitute. Across all competitions since the start of last season, Tel has averaged 1.54 shots per 90 following ball carries – that’s higher than any other Bundesliga player to have played at least 1,500 competitive minutes.

arts.ttl: New arrival Tel never rejected Spurs - Postecoglou
arts.sum: Tottenham manager Ange Postecoglou denies reports that Mathys Tel initially rejected the club before his deadline day move to north London.

arts.ttl: Richie Wellens tried to contact Ange Postecoglou after mocking Tottenham boss
arts.sum: Wellens released a statement apologising for his comments, saying he was “deeply embarrassed”.

Tottenham have a one-goal lead to protect when they travel to Anfield for the second leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final with Liverpool. An impressive victory in the first leg courtesy of Lucas Bergvall's late strike has seen Spurs put one foot in this year's final, but they still have an almighty challenge on their hands as they aim to reach Wembley Stadium and lift a first trophy since 2008.

Liverpool can book their place in the Carabao Cup final on Thursday evening but must overturn a one-goal deficit against Tottenham Hotspur at Anfield. The Reds suffered a surprise 1-0 defeat in the first leg at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, with Lucas Bergvall deciding the encounter with a late strike.
